sentences.text: Lunox was born with magical powers, and her dreamworld reflects and changes the real world.
With this power, she uses her dreamworld to temporarily maintain the balance of energy between order and chaos.
But as the power of order and the power of chaos rushed into her dreams, Lunox fell into a long sleep and turned into one of the "Twilight Orbs."

templates.text: Miraculous creatures born in Twilight Orb

*Lord of Abyss (Enemy)

sentences.text: As the final battle started, the Twillight Orb devoured the energies within the Mage and opened, from which stepped out a girl, who was surrounded by the power of Chaos and Order.
Her eyes are deep as the ancient lake.

The mysterious atmosphere she created then put all of the heroes into dreamland… The power of Chaos and Order have been struggling against each other since the ancient time, and the struggle had driven the world into desperation.
Lunox, the mysterious maiden, is the one who survived the desperation.
With her unique talent, she can project her dream into reality and change it.
One day, a sound whispered to her and told her to balance the two powers with her dreamland ability.
But the cost would be hunger than ever.
For the world she loves, she accepted this fate, channeled the two powers into dreamland and became one of the Twilight Orb, at the cost of falling into an endless sleep.
But the sound also told Lunox that one day, she will wake up to proceed with her fate: to find other Twilight Orbs that are forgotten by history

templates.name: Dreamland Twist
templates.description: Lunox is twisted by the powers of Chaos and Order. When Lunox uses, she gains 0.5% Spell Vamp for every 1% Magic Penetration. When Lunox uses , she gains 0.5% Magic Penetration for every 1% of Spell Vamp.
templates.notes:
*Despite the description, 's percentage magic penetration with 1 Order stack is indeed subtracted and converted into spell vamp and vice versa with 1 Chaos stack.
*Only percentage Magic Penetration is converted. Net value Magic Penetration, such as from, or  is not converted.
*Upon death,  loses the current stack of Order and Chaos.

templates.name: Starlight Pulse
templates.description: Lunox summons a rain of starlight upon nearby enemies, dealing . The starlight then returns to Lunox, each restoring and recovering . The HP restored is doubled when hitting enemy heroes. Grants one stack of after use.
templates.notes:
*Both skills 1 and 2 share the same cooldown and skill level. Levelling up one ability levels another.
*Has the range of 4.5 unit.
*If a target dies before a starlight reaches, the starlight will not return, result in no heal.
* fully benefits from returning starlights even when untargetable.
*Fully bounce to unsighted, concealed or invisible enemies, but not untargetable enemies.

templates.name: Chaos Assault
templates.description: Lunox unleashes Chaos Energy at an enemy, dealing Magic Damage equal to (1.5%–3% of Max HP against Creeps). Grants one stack of  after use.
templates.notes:
*Both skills 1 and 2 share the same cooldown and skill level.
*Has the range of 5 unit, similar to her attack range.
**The animation is slightly further than the effective range.
*Fully affect unsighted enemy, such as in a bush, invisible or in concealed.
*When affected by, this ability is neither affected by cooldown reduction, cooldown speed nor costs any mana.

templates.name: Cosmic Fission
templates.description: When Lunox uses the power of Order and Chaos, she will deal to the targets along the way and slow them by 40% for 2 seconds.
templates.notes:
*Has the range of 5 unit, beginning slightly behind .
*The ability first displays the animation and sound, then the cooldown, damage and effect gradually in a rectangular area, which in some cases when being controlled during the cast delay, only the animation is displayed.

templates.name: Order & Chaos
templates.description: Lunox is twisted by the powers of Chaos and Order. When Lunox uses, she gains and becomes invincible while dealing continuous damage to nearby enemies. When Lunox uses , she gains  and can blink in a target direction and greatly reduces the cooldown of  for a brief period.

templates.name: Power of Order: Brilliance
templates.description: Lunox extends the Light Barrier, becomes invincible for 2.5 seconds, and gains 30% extra Movement Speed while dealing every 0.5 seconds to nearby enemies.
templates.notes:
*Brilliance and Darkening have separate cooldown timer.
*Has the radius of 3.2 unit.
* and items like can be used during the process.
*Does not remove any ongoing control effects or impending buff, such as Cyclone Eye or, does not pass through obstacles.
* disappears on the minimap for the duration.
* is still attackable by creeps, minions, Lord and Turtle.
*The remaining invincible time is visible to both allies and enemies.
*The first pulse takes effect right upon cast. Result in total 6 damage pulses.
templates.bugs: *If the graphic setting is not suitable, certain battlefield effects will disappear or does not display when is invincible.

templates.name: Power of Chaos: Darkening
templates.description: Lunox blinks in the target direction, dealing to nearby enemies, slowing them by 30% for 4 seconds. For the next 4s, Lunox enhances her  to greatly reduce the cooldown of  (unaffected by CD Reduction).
templates.notes:
*Brilliance and Darkening have separate cooldown timer.
*The dash has the distance of 3.5 unit, the slow and damage effect has the distance of 3.2 unit.
*The cast range of becomes visible for the duration.
*The cooldown of  is set to 0.3 seconds and is not affected by cooldown reduction and cooldown speed for the duration.
* does not cost mana for the duration.
*The duration begins as soon as the ability is cast, which means if the landing is interrupted, the damage and slow effect of this skill does not take effect.
*The remaining duration is visible to both allies and enemies.
*If  has neither Order or Chaos stack upon learning ultimate, this ultimate is selected by default.

lists.text: Lunox' name is a portmanteau of two Latin words lumos and nox, respectively "light" and "dark" in English.
Her old hero title is named "the Enlightened One", in reference to the name of Buddha.
She is the main protagonist of the Determination event along with Belerick.
Lunox's Light and Darkness concept was reused for Luo Yi.
Her complementary "Bloody Mary" skin, is a reference to Mary I of England, so called due to her execution of numerous Protestants during her 6-year reign. It is also the name of a popular drink.
Lunox's light powers come from her mother, and her dark powers come from her father
Lunox is Unique God's gift to the world (Land of Dawn)
